# Test Document

This is a test markdown file for end-to-end (e2e) testing. It serves as a fixture for Playwright browser tests that verify the full annotation workflow, including text selection, comment creation, and highlight rendering.

## Section One

Here is some paragraph text that we can select and annotate.
This text has multiple sentences for testing purposes.

## Section Two

Another paragraph with different content. We can test annotations
across multiple sections of the document.

This is the last paragraph in our test document. It contains
enough text to allow for meaningful annotation testing.
